fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Arkansas Pharmacy Technician License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a pharmacy technician? Here's whether your license transfers to Arkansas - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: pharmacy technician license reciprocity arkansas, how to transfer pharmacy technician license to arkansas, pharmacy technician compact arkansas, arkansas pharmacy technician endorsement application

board.name: Arkansas Board of Pharmacy
board.mailing_address: 101 E. Capitol Ave., Suite 211, Little Rock, AR 72201

license_types.title: Certified Pharmacy Technician (CPhT)
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a pharmacy technician in Arkansas.

steps.title: Create Account & Submit Online Application
steps.description: Access the AR Pharmacist/Technician/Intern Online Licensing System (ar.elicense.ky.gov). Click 'Register a Person' to create a user account, then log in and select the Pharmacy Technician initial application to complete and submit it.

steps.title: Complete Criminal Background Check
steps.description: Register with the Arkansas State Police for a state and federal criminal background check. You will be directed to schedule fingerprinting with an approved vendor, such as IdentoGO. Specific instructions are typically provided within the online application process.

steps.title: Provide Proof of Education
steps.description: Upload evidence of a high school diploma or its equivalent directly within the online application system. Ensure the document is clear and legible.

steps.title: Obtain NABP eProfile ID
steps.description: If you do not already have one, create an NABP eProfile ID through the National Association of Boards of Pharmacy (NABP) website and provide this ID in your online application.

steps.title: Pay Application Fee
steps.description: Remit the required non-refundable application fee of $25.00 through the AR Pharmacist/Technician/Intern Online Licensing System using an accepted payment method (e.g., credit card).

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the PTCB (Pharmacy Technician Certification Board) or ExCPT exam.

provisional_text: Many states offer a limited permit or provisional license for new graduates waiting to take the PTCB. Check specific board rules for supervisory requirements.
reciprocity_text: Pharmacy Technicians licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

faqs.question: How much does a Arkansas pharmacy technician license cost?
faqs.answer: The initial application and licensing fee varies, often around $100 to $200. Check the specific fee breakdown above.

faqs.question: Is national certification required?
faqs.answer: Yes, passing the PTCB (Pharmacy Technician Certification Board) or ExCPT exam is a standard requirement for initial licensure across almost all states.

faqs.question: Does Arkansas have reciprocity for pharmacy technicians?
faqs.answer: No interstate compact currently covers pharmacy technician practice in Arkansas. To work in Arkansas, apply for licensure by endorsement through the state board.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my pharmacy technician license to Arkansas?
faqs.answer: Most endorsement applications take 4 to 6 Weeks.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Arkansas while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Pharmacy Technicians licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

hero.title: Become a Pharmacy Technician in Arkansas
hero.dek: Apply online through the AR Pharmacist/Technician/Intern Online Licensing System (ar.elicense.ky.gov). Create an account, select the Pharmacy Technician initial application, and follow the prompts for submission.

variants.description: How to become licensed/certified for the first time

variants.label: Reciprocity

official_links.registration_steps: Navigate to the portal, click 'Register a Person' to create a new user account, complete the required personal information, and then log in to access the application options and start a new application for Pharmacy Technician.
